smell.title: Smell-proof barrier
smell.body: Triple-layer activated carbon lining independently tested to block 99.9% of odour. Airtight press-seal closure keeps smells locked in and freshness locked out.

dimensions.title: Dimensions & capacity
dimensions.body: 19 × 12 cm when sealed. Fits up to 3.5 g comfortably with room for accessories. Tear-resistant and water-resistant outer shell.

shipping.title: Shipping & returns
shipping.body: Free UK shipping on orders over £25. Plain, unmarked packaging — no logos, no labels. Delivered in 2–4 working days. 30-day returns on unopened items.

spec.smell_detail: Triple-layer activated-carbon lining, independently lab-tested to block 99.9% of odour molecules.
spec.dimensions_detail: Heavy-gauge Mylar® with reclosable press-seal. Available in 3.5g, 7g, and 14g sizes.
spec.shipping_detail: Ships in plain, unmarked packaging. Free delivery over £25. Delivered in 2–4 working days.

accessories_teaser.heading: Accessories
accessories_teaser.body: Jars, cases & activated-charcoal inserts — landing soon. Be first to know.

brand_story.heading: Storage you'll actually want to show off.
brand_story.body: Odour-control storage always looked like an afterthought. We put collectible comic art on a properly engineered, odour-resistant pack — useful, discreet and genuinely nice to own.

faq.placeholder_a1: Yes. Every Stink Safe bag uses a triple-layer odour barrier — an activated-carbon inner lining sandwiched between two heat-sealed, food-grade PE layers. The combination blocks volatile organic compounds at the molecular level, keeping smells locked in (or out) for the life of the bag.
faq.placeholder_a2: Stink Safe bags come in three sizes: Small (10 × 7 cm) for single-use portions or pocket carry, Medium (15 × 10 cm) for standard herb storage, and Large (20 × 14 cm) for bulk storage or multiple items. All sizes feature the same triple-layer construction and press-seal closure.
faq.placeholder_q3: How many designs are in each pack?
faq.placeholder_a3: Each pack contains 6 unique collectible designs, chosen at random from the active collection drop. Because designs are randomised, every pack is a surprise — and trading duplicates with mates is half the fun. Check the individual collection pages to see which designs are currently in rotation.
faq.placeholder_a4: Absolutely. All orders are shipped in plain, unmarked packaging with no branding or product description on the outside. The sender name on the label is a neutral holding name, so there is nothing to give away what's inside.

about.title: Our story
about.heading_default: Art you love. Smell you don't.
about.body_default: We started Stink Safe because we couldn't find storage that took the art seriously. Everything on the market was either clinical or embarrassing — child-proof packaging with zero personality. We're a small London-based team of collectors who wanted something different: smell-proof bags that you'd actually want to be seen with. So we commissioned original artwork from independent artists, built a triple-layer odour barrier, and had it independently tested. That's it. No shortcuts.
about.value_2_sub: Every design is original commissioned artwork
